description:
📏 Available Sizes:
• 12 x 18 inches (Small) – Perfect for porches, patios, or balconies.
• 28 x 40 inches (Large) – Ideal for gardens, lawns, or larger outdoor spaces.

🧵 Material:
• Made from 100% premium polyester fabric.
• Double-stitched edges for added strength and durability.
• Fade-resistant and weatherproof for long-lasting outdoor use.

💝 Perfect For:
• Christmas and holiday outdoor décor.
• Funny political or activist-themed home decoration.
• A unique and humorous gift for friends, neighbors, or anyone with a bold sense of humor and pride.
